mapper.select: select id, user_id, scene_type, status, title, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, create_time, update_time from chat_session where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update chat_session set title = #{title}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update chat_session set ppt_url = #{pptUrl}, doc_url = #{docUrl}, game_url = #{gameUrl}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from chat_session where user_id = #{userId} and status in (0, 1)
select id, user_id, scene_type, status, title, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, create_time, update_time from chat_session where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
select id, user_id, scene_type, status, title, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, create_time, update_time from chat_session where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
